notes: v195: Pre-fetch R2 data immediately after login/checkSession (saves ~900ms)
v195: Splash fast-path when IndexedDB cache warm (MIN_SHOW=0, MAX_SHOW=400ms)
v195: Foreground file retry — 1 auto-retry after 2s on network fail
v195: Offline banner (persistent) when all 5 foreground files fail
v194: _doLoginHandled flag — prevents double hideLoginOverlay from doLogin + onAuthStateChange
v194: _sessionCheckHandling flag — prevents INITIAL_SESSION race with checkSession
v194: visibilitychange grace 2000→3500ms + cancel on TOKEN_REFRESHED
v194: _doLoginHandled reset in hideLoginOverlay as safety net
v194: resetRuntimeSessionState resets all v194 auth flags
v193m: Login icon sizing fixed (56→76px, box clips border-radius)
v193m: theme-color meta #006050→#0d3328 (removes blue bar on iOS)
v193m: SKU signal type slow (↘ ยอดต่ำ) with guard: days>15, days>avgInterval, gmv≥3000, gap≥30%
